artPrompt: A scrappy little goblin carny grinning behind a rigged prize counter, holding up a tiny shabby plush toy while a glittering Treasure-gold trinket gleams in firelight, strings of lurid bulbs and tattered striped canvas hazing into smoky black behind, sickly neon and hot-gold glow on its eager swindling face, tender and sinister, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Cheap Prize Goblin
text: When Cheap Prize Goblin enters the battlefield, create a Treasure token. (The big prize on the top shelf is decorative. You're getting the small one.)
flavorText: Congratulations. You spent eleven dollars to win a forty-cent goblin.
